queries.label: Per-account hydration via GraphQL — profile + top 30 repos (for the drawer)
queries.api_url: https://api.github.comPOST /graphql  query { repositoryOwner(login: "...") { ... on User { name location createdAt followers { totalCount } repositories(first: 30, ownerAffiliations: OWNER, isFork: false, orderBy: {field: STARGAZERS, direction: DESC}) { nodes { nameWithOwner stargazerCount repositoryTopics(first: 5) { nodes { topic { name } } } } } } } }
